comment.body: Yes both intraday scalps and swing trades. In combo with A/D and price patterns.  Easiest swings has been using it on the 2 hour chart and watching for the price to go outside the 2.5 SD band and playing for the reversion. The only times I have not traded that is when I noticed the A/D maintaining its momentum.
